core_vibe: Confidence + Clarity, data-driven authority but beginner-approachable. Rejects the 'purple/teal AI slop' for a clean, structural, technical look.

rules: No generic sans-serif for headings (BANNED: Inter, Roboto, Open Sans).
Headings must use tight letter spacing: 'tracking-tight'.

grid_strategy.dashboards: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 or gap-6

spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Grid Borders (The 'Technical' Look). Containers use border-collapse style layout. Items have `border-r border-b border-border/40`. Exposed skeleton.
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense data, labels, and paragraphs. 'Left-to-Right Hierarchy' for metrics (e.g., placing the Score at top-left).

components.strategy: Shadcn UI heavily customized with sharp edges or max 8px radius. Cardless structures where possible.
components.buttons: Flat, pure color blocks. Minimal shadow. 4px right padding offset if icon on left.
components.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-sm.
components.data_viz: Recharts or Shadcn Charts. No 3D charts. Clear, flat colors based on primary and accent.
components.modals: Backdrop blur heavy (backdrop-blur-xl) with solid surface.

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: ALWAYS explicitly set text color on hover. Border color darkens.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Use text-shadow if overlaying images.
accessibility.data_testid: MANDATORY on all buttons, links, form inputs, and key informational elements (e.g., `data-testid='scan-submit-btn'`).

image_urls.description: Abstract geometric metal framework for landing page hero background (use with heavy opacity overlay, e.g., bg-black/80 to maintain text contrast).
Minimalist workspace to illustrate the business owner persona context on the landing page.
Scrabble tiles spelling 'Social Media' to illustrate the creator persona context on the landing page or empty states.
Professional user avatar for testimonials, mock dashboard profiles, or outreach drafts.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load 'Cabinet Grotesk' via fontshare API link in HTML head: <link href='https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=cabinet-grotesk@800,500,700,400,900&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>
Load 'IBM Plex Sans' via standard Google Fonts approach.
Do NOT use HTML inputs for complex forms; use Shadcn Select/Calendar/Form.
Build the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid strategy. The 0-100 score should dominate the top-left of the Results page.
Avoid generic AI design patterns like purple-to-blue gradients, neon glowing text, or starry background particles.
Ensure the Landing page and New Scan page clearly split the two modes (Business vs Creator).
Every interactive element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case.
Use plain language in the UI (e.g., 'Why this hurts your conversions' instead of 'Optimization Vector Analysis').
